_instructions: Fill in YOUR details below. Every {{PLACEHOLDER}} in agent files will be replaced with these values during setup. Run setup.sh after editing this file.

author.name: Your Name
author.penName: Your Pen Name (or same as name)
author.bio: Your background, credentials, and expertise that differentiate your books
author.edge: What makes YOU the right person to write in your niches (e.g., 'Licensed pharmacist with 10 years clinical experience')

niches._note: Add as many categories as you publish in. Bookfinder will scan all of them.

models._note: Customize which AI models each agent uses. Defaults work well for most setups.

orchestrator._role: Author agent — pipeline management, planning, approvals

researcher._role: Bookfinder agent — market research, keyword analysis

editor._role: Editor agent — quality review, developmental and line editing

publisher._role: Publisher agent — KDP formatting, metadata, upload prep

marketer._role: Marketer agent — launch campaigns, ads, ongoing promotion

output._note: All manuscript and publishing files saved here. Pandoc must be installed for .docx conversion.

schedule._note: Day 0=Sunday, 1=Monday... 6=Saturday. Default: Wednesday at 9 AM ET.
